title: ARL Letter on ADA Title II Final Rule
content:
Last Updated on March 18, 2026, 4:30 pm ET

On March 18, 2026, ARL sent a letter to the Office of Information and Regulatory Affairs requesting a meeting to discuss the importance of the ADA Title II website regulation set to take effect on April 24, 2026.

ADA Title II Final Rule letter

The post ARL Letter on ADA Title II Final Rule appeared first on Association of Research Libraries.
creator: Katherine Klosek
sourceTitle: Public Policy Archives — Association of Research Libraries
